originalTitle: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
content: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

originalTitle: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
title: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
content: The baby hippo, which has been named Bumpy, was found clinging to its lifeless mother at a lake.

originalTitle: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
title: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
content: DNA tests are underway to confirm whether remains found inside the crocodile match that of a missing man.

title: Israeli strikes kill five Palestinians across Gaza in one day
content: Five Palestinians were killed in one day in separate Israeli strikes across Gaza.

title: Argentina investigates link to deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
content: Three deaths reported from South America-related hantavirus as cruise ship remains off Cape Verde coast.

originalTitle: In rare push, US lawmakers demand transparency on Israel nuclear capability
title: In rare push, US lawmakers demand transparency on Israel nuclear capability
content: Lawmakers say US policy of ambiguity on Israel's nuclear capabilities heightens risks amid US-Israel war on Iran.

originalTitle: Iran considering US proposal to end war, official says
title: Iran considering US proposal to end war, official says
content: The White House reportedly believes it could be closing in on a 14-point memorandum of understanding with Iran.

originalTitle: Trump's hopes for an Iran peace deal come with caveats
title: Trump's hopes for an Iran peace deal come with caveats
content: There are signs of fresh momentum to end the war, but Trump himself has injected a note of caution.

originalTitle: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
title: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
content: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.

originalTitle: From ego-ridden team to complete package - why PSG pose ultimate test
title: From ego-ridden team to complete package - why PSG pose ultimate test
content: Luis Enrique's expertise at rebuilding a culture as well as a team means Arsenal will confront the complete package when they meet holders PSG in the Champions League final.

originalTitle: Why resolute Arsenal will believe prolific PSG can be beaten in final
title: Why resolute Arsenal will believe prolific PSG can be beaten in final
content: With Paris St-Germain waiting in the Champions League final, will Arsenal withstand the firepower of one of Europe's most formidable attacks and lift the trophy for the first time on 30 May?

title: Inside Man City's WSL title-winning season
content: Manchester City have won a first Women's Super League title in 10 years - but how did they achieve it?
